sora-auth/pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Java source and target version to 21 in the Maven properties.
sora-auth/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against the previous Java version (likely 17), failing to leverage Java 21 features or enforce compatibility with the target runtime.

sora-common/pom.xml.general_idea: Set the project's Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.

sora-common/sora-core/pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate JAXB API dependency from javax namespace to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
sora-common/sora-core/pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.xml.bind package was removed from the JDK in Java 11 and replaced by jakarta.xml.bind in Jakarta EE 9+. Without this change, the application will fail to compile or run due to missing classes or namespace conflicts when using Spring Boot 3.x which enforces Jakarta EE namespaces.

sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization rules.
sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.why_exists: Compilation error: 'serialVersionUID' is not a serial component of the class (requires @Serial annotation since Java 14).

sora-common/sora-datasource/pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.
Update MySQL connector dependency to the new group ID and artifact ID required for Java 21 compatibility.
sora-common/sora-datasource/pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and may not be available or compatible with Java 21; the new artifact 'mysql-connector-j' under 'com.mysql' is the supported version.

sora-common/sora-redis/pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 in the module POM to align with the target JDK.

sora-gateway/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.

sora-modules/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK for the migration.

sora-modules/sora-system/pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 in the module's POM to align with the target JDK.

sora-modules/sora-system/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21's stricter serialization rules.
sora-modules/sora-system/src/main/java/c.why_exists: Java 21 introduces a compile-time error for serialVersionUID fields that are not annotated with @Serial, as part of the new serialization API checks.

sora-modules/sora-system/src/main/resour.general_idea: Remove bootstrap.yml configuration file as part of Spring Boot 3.x migration which deprecates the bootstrap context.
